items.title: New Caledonia Links With Thailand, Japan and Australia as Aircalin’s Airbus A350-900 Revolution Makes the Remote Pacific Paradise Easier to Reach, Unlocking Better Long-Haul Travel, Luxury Island Experiences and Global Tourism Growth
